dev_mode_warning: All parameters, card yields, and token balances shown are for simulation and testing purposes only. No real capital is used.
hero_title:
Own the Pitch.
Win on Solana.
hero_sub: You are the legends' agent. Bet live, play penalty shootouts with real rewards, and earn World Cup 2026 salaries. Football will never be the same.
presale_sub: Secure your discounted presale allocation before public listing and capitalize The Vault.
presale_footer_t: ⚠️ Direct contribution via the goalworld presale smart contract. Your tokens will be programmatically released to your connected wallet upon presale conclusion.
pitch_sub: It's not just a game. It's a complete ecosystem where your knowledge turns into real rewards on Solana.
pitch_feat1_d:
Decentralized parimutuel betting on every World Cup 2026 match.

Organic Odds and automated payouts by smart contracts.
pitch_feat2_d:
Verifiable on-chain model.

Betting fees are protocol-governed (current hard-cap: 1%) with community treasury routing.
pitch_feat3_d:
100 Genesis Squad legends.

Each NFT generates Daily Yield and dividends based on real player performance.
pitch_feat4_d:
Immediate action.

Challenge the community in the Penalty Minigame or build your 5v5 team for tournaments.
pitch_feat5_d:
Total Transparency.

Logic in Rust/Anchor. No hidden servers manipulating results or odds.
game_sub: Test the shooting mechanics designed for PSG1 directly from your browser. Tap a zone on the goal to kick.
game_step1: Choose a goal zone to shoot at
game_step2: The goalkeeper dives to a random position
game_step3: Score goals and build your streak
game_step4: At launch, your streaks will be worth real points
game_soon_desc: 5v5 multiplayer mode, tournaments with SOL prizes, and integrated betting during World Cup matches.
fix_sub: 48 teams, 12 groups. All tournament action integrated into goalworld for real-time betting.
rm_sub: Swipe horizontally to see our development plan.
econ_sub: An ecosystem designed to last. Transparent, circular, and profitable.
econ_flow_desc:
Bettors → Parimutuel Pools (Solana) → 99% Winners / 1% Fee (hard-cap).
Fee routing is explicit on-chain: burn share + jackpot share + treasury share. Stripe Agent Fund (10%) dynamically funds autonomous agents' operations, SaaS, and compute.
econ_feat1_d: Yes, the token is inflationary to reward participation (NFT Yield and prizes). This emission encourages constant entry of new users into the ecosystem.
econ_feat2_d: Fees and sinks are governance-adjusted. Current on-chain fee hard-cap is 1% to reduce extraction and improve fairness.
econ_feat3_d: Genesis NFTs get tired. Users MUST spend tokens to recover their players' energy (stamina) if they want to continue collecting rewards.
econ_feat4_d: Inflation attracts new capital. The game encourages constant spending. The result is a circular economy where token value is sustained by real utility.
pack_sub: Try your luck and get the World Cup 2026 captains.
pack_real_version: (In the real version this would mint on Solana)
mint_note: This is a technical test • In production it would mint on Solana
mint_alert_success:
Congratulations! You've minted your first Genesis NFT (simulated).

In the real version this would be a cNFT on Solana.
nft_desc: Explore the 1,248 stars of the World Cup. Swipe horizontally through the 3D gallery.
soc_sub: Complete tasks and quests in our official Zealy space to earn XP. Accumulated XP will be converted to $GCH tokens in the official airdrop! You can use Zealy to drive direct traffic to our mini-game.
soc_connect_info: Compete against the community to secure your allocation
team_sub: Two brothers, one passion: football and blockchain.
team1_role: The Mastermind - Visionary & Founder. Blockchain journey since 2016. Artist, mathematician, and father.
team2_role: The Artist - Tireless geek, aesthetic control and stress testing for an indestructible system.
wl_sub: Register for early access and exclusive benefits.
wl_note: Your wallet will be your identity. Phantom integration.
cta_sub: The 2026 World Cup is approaching. Don't be left out.
trust_sub: Institutional security and global liquidity for the future of football.
cookies_text: We use cookies to ensure goalworld works correctly and to analyze traffic. By continuing, you accept our privacy policy.
alpha_sub:
You are entering a technical demonstration of the goalworld Ecosystem.

Trading (Drift), Finance (Lending), and Academy (cNFTs) features are in SIMULATION mode for architecture testing.

No real capital is required or used in this phase.
econ_vault_d: 100% of revenue is deposited into Liquid Staking (Jito/mSOL). Your capital backs the network.
econ_burn_d: Staking yield buys back and burns $GCH. Perpetual buying pressure.
econ_boost_d: Providing liquidity (LP) multiplies your players' salaries.
econ_split_d: Fair split: 50% Jackpot, 20% Players, 30% DAO Treasury.
dao_title: BE PART OF THE DAO AND PROPOSE A NEW GAME 🏛️
ticker_3: 💎 Legendary Vini Jr minted in Pack #882...
zealy_desc: Enter our official Zealy platform, complete daily and weekly missions, interact on social media and level up to multiply your $GCH Airdrop allocation. You can use Zealy to drive direct traffic to our mini-game.
zealy_q1: Social Quests: Follow, Like, Repost on 𝕏
discord_desc: The degen trench. Debate fixtures, get real-time alerts, join trivia games and claim your Genesis Manager role.
mgr_sub: Manage your team, control your Yield and dominate the transfer market.
stad_sub: Own a World Cup venue. Earn revenue from every digital ticket sold.
stad_olympus_desc: Mythic Stadium. Colossal architecture with golden light rings at the top and smart turf. Maximum betting traffic.
stad_kronos_desc: Mythic carbon dome integrated with quantum oracles. Instant distribution of dividends to holders.
stad_titanium_desc: Legendary Stadium. Cybernetic coliseum with titanium panels and cyan lights. Optimized for high transfer volume and mints.
stad_obsidian_desc: Legendary Stadium. Obsidian arena with Solana Green LED contours and carbon turf. Excellent passive yield.
stad_aether_desc: Epic Stadium. Geodesic dome illuminated with Electric Cyan neon lights. High-speed oracle connectivity and stable transaction volume.
coll_sub: Manage your players and prepare your lineup for the World Cup 2026.
coll_empty_hint: Players you obtain from the Mystery Pack will appear here.
launch_sub: Our roadmap towards the 2026 World Cup.
infinity_desc: An ecosystem designed to last. Transparent, circular, and profitable.
notif_optin_desc: Receive goal and bet alerts directly in your wallet.
xscout_desc: X-Scout is our autonomous AI agent that constantly tracks social networks and markets on Solana. It discovers arbitrage opportunities, club token trends, and World Cup highlights in real-time.
colab_restrict_desc: This portal is exclusive for developers, partners, and authorized influencers of goalworld.
colab_join_d: Collaborations are open. To be whitelisted:
colab_join_step1: Open a ticket on our Discord.
